creator: dervish@ikhala.tcimet.net
text:
Codecrusader 2.1.4 was broken for FreeBSD 4.x+ systems.  The port failed in
a couple of places.  First in the FreeBSD specific configuration and also
in building the ACE library.

Fix: Here are the patches by Kent Stewart that allow the port to build ...
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/devel/codecrusader
make
